fields.label: Field
fields.description: ERPNext field name to EXCLUDE from drift comparison for this Item Map row. Drift on this field will not contribute to the Drift status (FDE marked it as intentional divergence).

fields.label: Reason
fields.description: Why this field is excluded (e.g. 'item_name intentionally renamed in ERPNext; EE-side carries marketplace title'). Captured for audit / future FDE rotation.
